headerDisplay: For help and support please visit GitHub. We hope you find this plugin useful!

clientSecret.title: Client Secret
clientSecret.description: Your Flume Client ID and Client Secret can be found at https://portal.flumetech.com.

disableDeviceLogging.title: Disable Device Logging
disableDeviceLogging.description: Global logging setting for accessory status changes. If true then accessory status changes will not be logged.

refreshInterval.title: Refresh Interval
refreshInterval.description: Number of minutes between requests to Flume for device leak information. Must be 1 or more.

layout.title: Advanced Settings
layout.description: Advanced settings for the plugin, including refresh options.
